# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected security vulnerabilities responsibly using the
repository owner's preferred published contact information. Where public
disclosure could create avoidable risk, do not file the report as a public
issue.

Include enough detail to reproduce and assess the concern, such as the affected
revision, relevant environment, impact, and a minimal reproduction when safe to
provide.

## Response approach

Reports will be reviewed in good faith. The owner will assess reproducibility,
impact, and appropriate disclosure or remediation steps as circumstances allow.
No response time or remediation outcome is guaranteed.

## Scope

This policy applies to security concerns in the contents of this repository.
It does not cover GitHub's platform, third-party services, or unsupported
deployments and modifications outside the repository.
